title: Winter Apocalypse: The Great Cold
description: The world cooled down. Now only snowy and sprucy biomes generate. no more, no less.
body:
# The Great winter Apocalypse Came!
**The world cooled down.**

**Now only snowy and sprucy biomes generate. This means the world shrunk, and the height limit is 448, means 512 blocks of freedom!**

**Features:**
- All Biomes have been replaced with (snowy) taigas, snowy plains, frozen or cold versions of oceans or rivers, and all cold versions of windswept biomes.

- Build height above Y=0 is 448. Below Y=0 stays the same (-64)

**How to Install?**
  
Installation process is simple: during pre-world generation setup, go to More -> Data Packs -> Open Pack folder and move the zip file into the opened location.

Have fun.
